text.tspan: EDGE COMPUTING: move compute from central cloud to network/device edge.
Reduce latency, save bandwidth, work offline, respect data locality.

g.text: THE SPECTRUM (cloud u2192 edge u2192 device)

text.tspan: u2022 LATENCY: physics says light takes ~5ms per 1000km; edge is faster
u2022 BANDWIDTH: process video locally vs uploading full feed
u2022 OFFLINE: keep working without connectivity
u2022 DATA SOVEREIGNTY: GDPR, PIPL data residency
u2022 RESILIENCE: regional outage doesn't kill the edge
u2022 COST: edge compute often cheaper than egress
u2022 IoT data filtering before upload
u2022 AR/VR, gaming low-latency hot path
u2022 heavy compute (large ML training / inference)
u2022 complex SQL joins across global data
u2022 anything needing ACID across edge nodes
u2022 EDGE CACHE: cache responses near user (CDN)
u2022 EDGE COMPUTE: run code at PoP for personalization
u2022 EDGE STATE: KV stores at edge (eventually consistent)
u2022 OFFLINE-FIRST: local-first apps; sync when online
u2022 PROGRESSIVE ENHANCEMENT: client-side rendering with edge fallback
u2022 IoT TIERING: device u2192 gateway u2192 cloud (filtering at each tier)
Fastly Compute / Deno Deploy / AWS Wavelength
run code at PoPs; ms latency to user
KV stores at edge (Workers KV, R2)
factory floor, retail store, telco base station
AWS Outposts / Azure Stack Edge / Snowball
local ML inference (Core ML, TF Lite, ONNX Runtime)
